phases: Phase 1: Step 2.5 issue-state pre-check + lint enforcement

limitations: advisory WARN-only pre-check; operator decides whether existing MERGED PR truly closed the same target; searches current repo only (no cross-repo); when gh unavailable or non-issue target, step is skipped with one-line note (Phase 75 declarative-tolerance pattern)
non_goals: /qor-auto-dev-1 SKILL.md not updated (lives outside repo SSoT at user-side install path); same prose pattern can be applied externally as a recommended companion change
exclusions: no changes to /qor-plan, /qor-implement, /qor-audit, /qor-substantiate; Step 2.5 scope-conditional (only fires when target is an existing GH issue number)
